top_signals.title: Fortuna wins key approval for Senegal gold project
top_signals.summary: Fortuna said this authorization marks a “decisive step” toward obtaining the permit.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Agencies publish resolution plan feedback letters for certain domestic and foreign banking organizations
top_signals.summary: Agencies publish resolution plan feedback letters for certain domestic and foreign banking organizations
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Squid adds Ripple’s RLUSD stablecoin for cross-chain swaps
top_signals.summary: Cross-chain platform Squid has integrated Ripple's RLUSD stablecoin, allowing users to swap into and out of RLUSD across chains and assets.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Barr, Deregulating in a Financial Boom: What Could Go Wrong?
top_signals.summary: Speech At American University, Washington, D.C.

top_signals.title: Waller, Policy Risks Have Changed
top_signals.summary: Speech At The Centre for Central Banking Guest Lecture, Frankfurt School of Finance and Management, Frankfurt, Germany

top_signals.title: JBS, Embraer Courted in Venezuela as Brazil Seeks New Ties
top_signals.summary: Brazilian companies are racing to plant their flag in Venezuela as the country reemerges from more than a decade of isolation.

top_signals.title: Japan steps on the gas in unprecedented regional defense export push
top_signals.summary: Japan is moving with unusual speed to deepen defense ties across the Indo-Pacific after easing military export rules, with Indonesia emerging as one of the clearest beneficiaries.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
